HIGHWAYS (Department of Road Transport and Highways) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 20th October, 2004 And whereas, copies of the said notification were made available to the public on 26'h August, 2003; · G.S.R. 700(E).- Whereas the draft of certain rules called the Highways Administration Rules. 2003. which the Central Government proposes to make, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) read with clauses (a), (g), (h), (i), (m), (n), (o), (p), (q), (r), (s), (t), (u).
